backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a clip management system with CRUD operations for video clips, similarity scoring between clips, related clip recommendations, and engagement-based trending clip calculations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed branding updates: changing the application header from 'ClipTube' to 'Beast Clipping' in Layout.tsx and updating the HTML page title in index.html.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing components, hooks, and configuration files for the Beast Clipping video clip management application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark themes, including primary colors, backgrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with the page title set to 'Beast Clipping' and a root div for mounting the app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component orchestrating video playback, clip creation, viral suggestions, and clip list display with state management for video selection, clip selection, and AI-suggested clips.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual clip details including thumbnail with viral score badge, title, duration, timestamps, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Scrollable list component displaying all saved clips with loading states, empty state messaging, and clip selection/deletion handlers.
Sidebar component displaying AI-powered viral clip suggestions ranked by potential, with the ability to select suggestions to auto-populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: React component that provides a form UI for creating video clips with start/end timestamps, title input, validation, and save functionality. Supports loading data from selected clips or AI-suggested clips and displays time range preview.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component that wraps the application with a header (showing YouTube and Scissors icons with "Beast Clipping" branding) and footer (with caffeine.ai attribution link).
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering and validating YouTube video URLs, extracting video IDs, and triggering the video load callback with error handling.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score (0-100) with color-coded styling, icons (Flame/TrendingUp/Sparkles), and optional labels based on score thresholds.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Responsive YouTube video player component that embeds a video using an iframe with the provided video ID in a 16:9 aspect ratio card.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the Internet Computer actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook for creating video clips with a mutation that calculates viral scores based on duration and title characteristics, then saves clips via the actor and invalidates related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook for fetching all user clips and deleting clips via React Query, managing loading states and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook managing clip timestamp state (start/end minutes/seconds), providing validation, time conversion utilities, formatting functions, and the ability to set times from total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React Query hook that fetches trending clips from the backend actor when available.
Hook providing utility functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns for youtube.com and youtu.be formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color variables for UI components (primary, secondary, accent, destructive, etc.) and chart colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, mounting the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors mapped to CSS variables (using OKLCH), custom border radius values, Inter font family, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a YouTube video clipping application called 'Beast Clipping', documenting completed features (video URL input, embedded player, clip selection, saved clips list, AI suggestions, viral potential indicators) and pending feature requests (clip metadata storage, AI-powered selection, YouTube login integration).
